name: uniprot-mcp
description: Reference-quality Model Context Protocol server for the UniProt protein knowledgebase. 38 tools across 8 families: search/lookup, structural (PDB cross-refs, AlphaFold pLDDT bands), variants & disease (ClinVar bridge, position-aware variant lookup, OMIM), position-aware features (active sites, signal peptides, modified residues, natural variants), composition dossier (sequence chemistry, drug-target context, disease associations), orthology, local provenance cache with replay, and per-query provenance verification (release-aware SHA-256 of canonical bytes). Every successful response carries a verifiable Provenance record (UniProt release number, release date, retrieval timestamp, resolved URL, SHA-256 digest) surfaced as a Markdown footer, JSON envelope, or PIR-style FASTA header. All tools are read-only and require no API key.

dataSource.name: UniProt Knowledgebase
dataSource.citation: The UniProt Consortium. UniProt: the Universal Protein Knowledgebase in 2025. Nucleic Acids Research (2025). doi:10.1093/nar/gkae1010
